name: Tumble
description: Isometric tumbling blocks, three faces of each cube re-shading as the stack shifts.

code.style: --rule: ( --rot: @pick(0deg, 120deg, 240deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { -webkit-clip-path: polygon(50% 0, 93% 25%, 93% 75%, 50% 100%, 7% 75%, 7% 25%); clip-path: polygon(50% 0, 93% 25%, 93% 75%, 50% 100%, 7% 75%, 7% 25%); background: conic-gradient(from 90deg, @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)) 0 120deg, @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)) 120deg 240deg, @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)) 240deg 360deg); -webkit-transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
